note: Frontal pole; Yeo splits between CONT (lateral) and DEFAULT (medial); HO FP covers both
SFG straddles CONT/DEFAULT/SOMMOT in Yeo; default CONT
IFG triangularis: CONT or VENTATTN; default CONT
Anterior STG paralimbic; some sources DEFAULT
Anterior ITG often DMN; sometimes LIMBIC
Superior parietal lobule = intraparietal sulcus area (DorsAttn)
Posterior SMG can be DorsAttn; default VENTATTN
Superior LOC borders DorsAttn (could also be VIS)
Posterior PaHC sometimes mapped to DEFAULT
Anterior temporal fusiform = ventral visual stream
Posterior temporal fusiform = ventral visual stream
Thalamus; Yeo-7 not defined for subcortex - auxiliary bucket
Cerebellar lobule I (Buckner 2011 cerebellar-Yeo split not applied in v1)
